_comment: Object-storage publishing config. base_url is the PUBLIC read base for the bucket (e.g. a Cloudflare R2 custom domain or <accountid>.r2.dev URL). Two datasets are served from here: each mark's episode rows as one gzipped CSV at base_url/<marks_prefix>/<mark_id>/episodes.csv.gz (listed in datasets/episodes.manifest.json), and the frozen raw inputs at base_url/<source.r2_object_key> (reproducibility). The marks metadata is the second dataset but lives in git, not here. Everything is referenced by URL + SHA-256, so changing base_url does not affect integrity. Replace the placeholder before publishing.
